Microbial Informatics¶

Read on for Microbiology 8194: Microbiome Informatics (Fall 2019). Here, you’ll find a list of topics covered by the course and a set of references (if available) on this website.

Week 1: Intro to the Course and OSC (see OSC Introduction and Guide)

Week 2: Review 5161

Week 3: Intro to Human, Ocean and Soil Microbiomes

Week 4: Community Taxonomic Approaches (see QIIME2)

Week 5: Ecological Statistics

Week 6: “Meta” databases

Previous topic

Introduction and Overview

Next topic
